description: Overall, the experience with Zoho Commerce has been good, especially in terms of integrations and ease of management. However, there is still room for improvement. Key features such as a streamlined quotation creation process and allowing customers to directly download PDFs should be added. Expanding shipping integrations (e.g., Blue Dart) would also enhance functionality. Additionally, implementing mandatory SKU generation with auto-numbering in sequence would improve inventory management. Some features, like the Zoho Slider, require better stability, and the platform would benefit from more modern and flexible theme options.
author: Deeppak G.
pros: Zoho Commerce seamlessly integrates with Zoho Books and Zoho CRM, along with multiple shipping options, creating a unified ecosystem for business operations. It also offers its own built-in payment solution, eliminating the need for third-party tools. All these features come together as a one-click solution, simplifying processes and saving time. With everything accessible through a single dashboard, even the CEO can easily monitor and manage the entire business—this is the true beauty of Zoho.
cons: We have repeatedly requested the Zoho team to develop a simpler and more efficient Quote workflow—specifically enabling easy quotation creation and allowing customers to directly download PDFs—which is essential for businesses like ours where we handle a high volume of large, customized quotations. However, despite multiple follow-ups, this requirement has not yet been addressed by the development team, making the quoting process less streamlined than expected. Additionally, features like mandatory SKU creation with auto-generated sequential numbering are still missing, which creates challenges in maintaining proper product organization and inventory consistency.

review_title: One Single Software to Manage it ALL
description: Overall experience (tech system, features, security, integrations, support) has been quite good. Also, Zoho Commerce need to have a dedicated customer care toll free call facility as well as real time chat facility like their other products. Zoho Commerce is a customer facing software (unlike Books) hence it becomes critical to get support from Zoho team.
author: Ashish L.
pros: Zoho Commerce has a tight integration with corresponding backend systems like Books, Inventory, SalesIQ, CRM etc which means that it becomes very easy to manage the after sales actions like order & inventory management, accounts, customer relationship etc.
cons: Most critical missing feature is bulk upload of product images and specifications. It takes a LOT of time to bulk upload products via excel and then map each variant manually to image in GUI.

review_title: After using for more than 6 months
author: Abhishek G.
pros: Easy integration with Zoho inventory and Books so invoicing and inventory management is much easier, integration with Google, FB etc is good
cons: Very less known in market, many 3rd party players do not provide support for this. Buggy many a times. Payment gets stuck in Razorpay. If you are suing multiple warehouses, commerce show stock combining from all warehouses even though we assign 1 particular warehouse to commerce.

review_title: Best In class and Best ecommerce solution
description: we are building the biggest B2B parts and accessories store in India for service centers, field engineers and repair shops. we have the freedom to move our business from B2B to B2B2C with lot of other supporting apps like zoho salesiq, marketing automation and zoho campaigns
author: sushil S.
pros: This software has given us the freedom to work from anywhere and syncing our inventory to accounts to control of every transaction in all aspects, not only this we can control lot of things from our mobile apps
cons: nothing much yes some features which we need to try as per our marketing and sales strategy is the limitation on all saas based ecommerce platform whether it is shopify or big commerce

review_title: Zoho Commerce has changed the way our customers now shop and place orders!
description: We always had a traditional method of receiving orders and providing stock availability to our wholesale customers, via email and phone calls. This resulted in a very time-consuming and costly process for our company. With Zoho Commerce , our customers are now able to see the stock status of our products in real-time and place their orders without having to call us. Our cost and time savings have thus increased considerably.
author: Farhan S.
pros: The software is easy to use, has a variety of design templates to choose from, easily synchronizes with other Zoho and non-Zoho applications, and is as good as any top-of-the-line e-commerce application on the market today.
cons: We found only a few features missing but it is also due to the fact that our business model requires features that are not common to most other e-commerce businesses. On this front, the Zoho design and engineering teams have been very cooperative and are working with us to incorporate these custom features for us.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: ZOHO Commerce is a Simple & a User-Friendly E-Commerce Platform
description: Since our business was not a technology intense, we decided to use a 3rd party commerce platform - Zoho Commerce . From day 1, our experience with their sales & customer support team was great. With the help of their support team, I was able to setup & successfully launch our website in 2 hours, since then any additional support or issues was addressed immediately. With the help of Zoho Commerce, our sales grew to 5 folds within 1 year and expecting it to only multiply further. It is very user-friendly for a non-tech person like me. I also feel their pricing is very cost effective. I would strongly recommend Zoho for all SMEs.
author: Balakumar R.
pros: Pricing : It is definitely cost effective & affordable for all small & mid sized companies. User-Friendly: It's very easy to use, even for a non-technical professionals. Initial Integration: was very simple and quick. Customization: Build your website the way you wanted. Customer Support: Both sales & technical support.
cons: User Password: Signup User ID password can be made simple. Default Content: Few default contents (Eg. out of stock error/notification message and few more) require development. Honestly, no too many cons, compared to their pros.

description: It has been amazing the past 2 years. Love how it integrates into Zoho books
author: Brandy J.
pros: How easy it is to use and create . Love that it integrates into Zoho books
cons: Wish there was a mobile app. This would make entries so much easier on the run

author: Nafis S.
pros: Easy to set up and integration with zoho books and inventory
cons: More options of website templates need to be provided

review_title: Worst customer support I've ever faced
description: another expense on top of Zoho One apps, and much less support provided. I have to wait days to hear back from commerce support. Much less user-friendly than Zoho Sites. Less customization options.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love that it's a suite of apps that streamline daily operations.
cons: The support is awful. Hard to get any real answers and support staff know less about the software and apps than I do at this point. Had to figure a lot of things out myself while waiting for an answer from support. Too many solo apps that require additional monthly subscription fees. Software is buggy and support will just tell you to clear cache/cookies instead of resolving the issue.

review_title: Recognize this great tool called Zoho Commerce.
description: Quiet honestly, this time with Zoho Commerce , Zoho has win our hearts. The program is such a powerful tool with ease of access. Developers have done a great job really. The best part is the customer service. I have met this girl [SENSITIVE CONTENT] and a lad named[ SENSITIVE CONTENT]. Both of them have proved to be an excellent customer support representatives with required patience, skills and required knowledge of the product.
author: Aman G.
pros: The ease of access for starters. Compatible with all Zoho One programs that we use.
cons: Ease of access, like I stated before. It consists of almost every feature that we required to run our business which is really great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One of the best software for multi-channel store
description: Overall, will definitely recommend Zoho Commerce .
author: Amit G.
pros: Very easy to use product especially if you use the rest of the Zoho ecosystem. Commerce team is always available to help think through and customize to your business needs.
cons: Commerce is competing with Shopify and needs to deploy new features and functionality faster.

review_title: Great way to diversify your website hosting portfolio
author: Ricardo R.
pros: I was able to make a website easily as other places to build stores online. I can rely on zoho when others are giving me issues.
cons: I would get a 404 page sometimes when trying to add things.

author: Shanikwa N.
pros: Zoho Commerce allows businesses to create online stores, accept orders and process payments, inventory tracking and shipping options.
cons: The pricing features for subscribers aren’t the best.

author: Ricardo P.
pros: The mobile app which is very great to use
cons: the software which sis very great to use

author: Mohan V.
pros: Visual Editor Product Photos compatibility
cons: In dashboard can not ale to see product listed under which category.

author: Kiran V.
pros: Easy to use, user friendly, inertfave is good
cons: Bugs, too many bugs, lack of customisation in front end

review_title: nice software and cooperative staff especially
author: jugraj S.
pros: its a good software for building up the ecommerce store..should definitely go for it
cons: no cons its all good not faced a single problem
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ashwin M.
pros: Deployment is easy as we need not wait for a tech team.
cons: Sometimes the booking flow doesnt match for our products
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Prashant S.
pros: I can handle by own easy to manage and operate.

author: Karthi G.
pros: Fast Easy Fast Easy Fast Easy Fast Easy Fast Easy
cons: Invoicing/Workflow not implemented properly as Per indian GST Rule
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Selvakumar K.
pros: Web creation is more easy. Create a website using drag and drop is a excellent experiance. Integration with other app like google analytic, facebook pixel is more easy. only copy the ID and past it in integretion part is excellent. zoho offering 40+ apps for monitering website, inventory, accounts, and everying. that all available in ZOHO only. i really love ZOHO.
cons: Product listing Page and Details page, all in selection mode. i need to change it using drag and drop like website. in attribute selection side, there is a default selection. Please remove the default selection. if a customer trying to add product pop up should come and should highlight the attributs for selecting.

review_title: Review as an Agency for e-com clients.
description: We use zoho commerce for testing purpose for our e-com clients. because lack of functionality and creative outlook of website. Slider header, and other elements are not editable. We cant be creative with the website design. After establishing a digital marketing background and initial roadmap for client, we switch from ZC to shopify and Storehippo
author: dushyant C.
pros: It is easy to use and simple to understand.
cons: The templates, (Extremely poor designs) No option for product to be zoomed during hover, while this is very basic but necessary feature of every e-com website. Creative limitation due to non availability of code customisation option. We can not create our theme.

description: This is my first experience and my first project with zoho commerce . Even after using the trial, I had a lots of doubts while working on my real project. So every time I emailed my doubts, I got relevant solutions, which I sometimes missed in the tutorials.
author: Shyamala N.
pros: Even the difficult features of ecommerce were made easy and simple to use like integrating with Razorpay, Google Analytics and setting the payment gateway
cons: The call on action feature (floating whatsapp icon for quick access), live chat option. It would be better if Instagram and YouTube social shares are also available. For new users like me, we have doubts every day as and when we work on it. So it would be great if your support team works on Saturday and Sunday also. If not on Sunday, atleast on Saturday's The live chat option is available only for the trial version. Once the project is moved from the trial version, the live chat is not available. It will be fine if live chat is available even to the premium projects, so that we'll be able to find solutions immediately or we have to wait till we receive the reply in email.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Well, I have had many many many conversations with your support, in particular Sudha, Naresh, and recently with Arjun. I showed them many many many problems since the first time I started using the products, since then a few issues have been addressed, but many remain unresolved till date
author: Manoj M.
pros: Payment Integrations (Razorpay, Paypal), Logistics (Shiprocket) Quick to set up, and work seamlessly
cons: Too many glitches Obvious functions missing High price for premium plans Too Slow, backend load time Does not meet all of the govenrment compliances Upgrades come out very slow

description: Our experience with Zoho is good overall. We get the required support whenever needed. Website speed is good and also its user friendly.
author: Doncy S.
pros: The website speed is good and ease of use.
cons: Would be great if many other functionalities like wish list, gift options , gift card options are added soon as we can see there are so many e commerce platforms and competitors effectively using them.
